# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Comprehensive Logging Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  log-all-environment-variables:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Log all environment variables
        run: |
          echo "Environment Variables:"
          printenv | sort
          echo ""

      - name: Log command output
        run: |
          echo "Command Output:"
          $(command)  # replace with your command

      - name: Log API responses
        uses: octokit/request-action@v2
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          api_response=$(curl -X GET \
            https://api.github.com/users/octocat \
            -H 'Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN' \
            -H 'Content-Type: application/json')
          echo "API Response:"
          echo "$api_response"

      - name: Log connection string
        run: |
          conn_str=$(az account get-access-token --resource https://management.azure.com/ | jq '.access_token')
          echo "Connection String:"
          echo "$conn_str"
